img2, img3 and here I will do .img1 and I will put different img1, img2 and img3 whatever I want to put so basically I will put filters here so let's say I put filter in img1 I will put in filter let's say I want to make brightness 122% okay, and see the image will become bright so if I show you see the brightness here in fact I have to remove this filter of image, I don't want to blur every change, now the filter brightness I have done is on this image, so you see here when I am changing this value so see if I increase it, it is getting brighter and I can make it brighter and brighter, see I made it brighter so you can do all these things you can put one more filter here by giving space, so as we saw we put multiple animations, multiple transforms by giving space, even classes when we put multiple in html, we put it by giving space here also we can put contrast like this and if I want to increase the contrast then I can give value from 0 to 1 and I can give a bigger value than become like this you must have seen images like this old images, some cameras used to generate images like this, so by putting a sepia filter images become like this then after this there is another one, hue rotate then there is drop shadow which drops the shadow then what happens by hue rotate hue value changes and by drop shadow, a shadow drops as you can see here, so you can do this thing, these are the main filters, one very important filter is invert filter which inverts an image so if I come on this image and I say filter, invert and here I make it 1, so this image will be inverted, inverted image will be made all colors will be inverted, it will be converted to negative image if you have seen old times images, then in that we don't get to see these things and if I reduce this increase this value, let's say I make it 0.2 and 0.3, so this image will be as thick as this, and if there is something else below this, then that will also be visible if opacity is less, so if you use grid and overlap, one of the most important use cases of grid is that you can grid the display and bring all things in one cell and stack items on top of each other, I told you in the grid video,
